name: Ai2 Semantic Scholar Paper Fetch

meta.description: Fetch detailed metadata for any paper using Semantic Scholar API (Ai2). Returns title, abstract, authors, venue, year, citations, references, open-access PDF link if available.

specs.name: run
specs.description: Fetch paper details from Semantic Scholar (Ai2).

name: Ai2 Semantic Scholar Author Fetch

meta.description: Fetch author profile from Semantic Scholar (Ai2) including name, affiliation, h-index, and list of papers.

specs.name: run
specs.description: Fetch author profile from Semantic Scholar (Ai2).

name: Ai2 Semantic Scholar Recommendations

meta.description: Get a list of recommended / similar papers for a given seed paper (Semantic Scholar API – Ai2).

specs.name: run
specs.description: Get recommended papers for a seed paper from Semantic Scholar (Ai2).

name: Ai2 Asta MCP Semantic Search

meta.description: Semantic full-text / snippet search across millions of papers via Ai2 Asta MCP endpoint. Returns ranked results with titles, snippets, scores, and links.

specs.name: run
specs.description: Semantic search on Ai2 Asta MCP corpus.
